blended.narrative: Canyon Ski Resort is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 3.4 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 829 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 6 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 3.1" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 2.0" of snow, highs of 21°F. Expect powder.
